phrases.intent_en: Where is the Slave Market Museum?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Museu do Mercado de Escravos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH SHKRAH-voosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Mercado de Escravos Museum is a key historical site in Lagos, located at Praça Gil Eanes, marking the first slave market in Europe.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Praça Gil Eanes.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH PRAH-suh ZHEEL EHAHN-nihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at Gil Eanes Square.

responses.english: Good morning, at Gil Eanes Square.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH PRAH-suh ZHEEL EHAHN-nihsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, na Praça Gil Eanes.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Slave Market Museum?
phrases.text_local: Onde está o Museu do Mercado de Escravos?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-deh es-TAH oo moo-ZEH-oo doo mer-KAH-doo djeez-KRAH-vooz?
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is housed in a historic building near the old town square.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Rua da República.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ROOUH DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, on Rua da República.

responses.english: Good morning, on Rua da República.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ROOUH DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, na Rua da República.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Praça Gil Eanes?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah ah PRA-sah JEEL eh-AHN-eez
phrases.cultural_note: The square honors the navigator and connects to the waterfront.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao mercado municipal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the municipal market.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the municipal market.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto ao mercado municipal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist office is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o posto de turismo local?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo loo-KAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Tourist offices in Portugal often operate from historic gates.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Porta de São Gonçalo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH SOWN goong-SAH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at Porta de São Gonçalo.

responses.english: Good morning, at Porta de São Gonçalo.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH SOWN goong-SAH-loo.
responses.french: Bom dia, na Porta de São Gonçalo.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Museu do Mercado de Escravos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW moo-ZEHOO DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH SHKRAH-voosh?

likely_response.local: O museu fica no centro histórico, siga as placas.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW moo-ZEHOO FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: The museum is in the historic center, follow the signs.

responses.english: The museum is in the historic center, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: AW moo-ZEHOO FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh.
responses.french: O museu fica no centro histórico, siga as placas.

phrases.text_local: Em que local se encontra o turismo?
phrases.pronunciation: AYNG KIH loo-KAHL SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AW too-REEZH-moo?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff assist with maps and local event schedules.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Porta de São Gonçalo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH SOWN goong-SAH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at Porta de São Gonçalo.

responses.english: Good morning, at Porta de São Gonçalo.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH SOWN goong-SAH-loo.
responses.french: Bom dia, na Porta de São Gonçalo.
